meta.name: Schedule client meetings via web forms with Google Calendar, Zoom and multi‑channel notifications

name: Automated Client Meeting Scheduling & Instant Notifications

parameters.message:
=Hello, {{ $('Code (Configure Meeting Information)').item.json.client_name }}

Thank you for your booking request. Unfortunately, the requested time slot on {{ $('Format Date & Time').item.json.formattedDate.toLocaleString('ja-JP', { timeZone: 'Asia/Dhaka' }) }} at {{ $('Code (Configure Meeting Information)').item.json.booking_time }} is not available.

Please submit a new booking request with an alternative time.

Thanks 💌
— SpaGreen Creative
parameters.subject: Time slot unavailable.

parameters.content:
## Overview
This intelligent workflow automates the meeting scheduling process from web form submissions. It triggers when a potential customer fills out a booking form, checks calendar availability in real-time, creates a calendar event if the slot is available, and sends out confirmations and notifications through multiple channels including email and WhatsApp.
## How It Works 
1. Triggered automatically when a booking form is submitted via webhook
2. Formats submitted date and time for processing
3. Sets default meeting details like title, duration, and password
4. Extracts customer info and calculates booking times
5. Checks Google Calendar for slot availability
6. If available, proceeds to book; if not, sends rejection notice
7. Creates event in Google Calendar with booking info
8. (Optional) Creates Zoom meeting for the booking (currently disabled)
9. Sends confirmation email to customer and WhatsApp notification to team
10. If slot unavailable, emails customer to select a different time
### Configure Credential
* Google Calendar OAuth2 – for availability checks & event creation
* Zoom API – for meeting creation (currently disabled)
* Gmail OAuth2 – for sending emails
* Microsoft Teams OAuth2 – for team notifications (disabled)
* Discord Bot API – for Discord notifications (disabled)
* Rapiwa API – for WhatsApp notifications
## Customization Options 
* Edit meeting title, duration & password in event setup node
* Modify confirmation & rejection emails in Gmail nodes
* Customize WhatsApp and other notification messages
* Change target Google Calendar ID for event creation
* Enable or disable notification channels (Zoom, Teams, Discord) via their nodes
## Useful Links
- **Google Calendar API Documentation**: [Google Calendar Docs](https://developers.google.com/calendar/api)
- **Zoom API Documentation**: [Zoom Docs](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/introduction)
- **Gmail API Documentation**: [Gmail Docs](https://developers.google.com/gmail/api)
- **Microsoft Teams API Documentation**: [Teams Docs](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoftteams/platform/overview)
- **Discord API Documentation**: [Discord Docs](https://discord.com/developers/docs/intro)
- **Rapiwa API Documentation**: [Rapiwa Docs](https://rapiwa.com/docs)

# Web Form Meeting Booking & Calendar Check
* **Trigger:** Starts when someone submits a web booking form
* **Set Meeting Details:** Sets default meeting title, duration, and password
* **Extract Info:** Collects customer name, email, message, and booking time
